zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Freeman於1572年出生在英國素可普爾波洛時，他的父親John Freeman31歲，母親Katherin Tryphosa Isham27歲。他於1591年1月1日與Alice Coles在英國素可普爾波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1620年在英國素可普爾波洛被列為yeoman。他去世於1623年6月6日在英國英格蘭素可普爾波洛享年51歲，埋葬在英國素可普爾波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Freeman于1572年出生在英国素可普爾波洛时，他的父亲John Freeman31岁，母亲Katherin Tryphosa Isham27岁。他于1591年1月1日与Alice Coles在英国素可普爾波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1620年在英国素可普爾波洛被列为yeoman。他去世于1623年6月6日在英国英格兰素可普爾波洛享年51岁，埋葬在英国素可普爾波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Freeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English freman, fremon ‘freeman, free-born man’ (Old English frēomann, frīgmann), used also occasionally as a personal name. As an African American surname it was in many cases adopted as a name denoting a man freed of slavery. See also Fryman and Free .
Irish: Anglicized (‘translated’) form of Gaelic Ó Saoraidhe (see Seery ).

variants.name: Free
meanings: English: nickname or status name from Middle English fre ‘free’ (Old English frēo), with reference to either tenurial status (‘free born’) or to character (‘noble, generous, open-handed’).
Americanized form of Swiss German and German   Frei   and   Frey  .

variants.name: Fryman
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Frymann or German Freimann (see Freiman ), and possibly also of the Dutch cognate Vrijman.
English: from Middle English friman ‘free-born man’ (Old English frīomann, frīgmann), symonymous with Freeman 1.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Freeman was born in 1572, in Pulborough, Sussex, England, his father, John Freeman, was 31 and his mother, Katherin Tryphosa Isham, was 27. He married Alice Coles on 1 January 1591, in Pulborough, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. In 1620, at the age of 48, his occupation is listed as yeoman in Pulborough, Sussex, England. He died on 6 June 1623, in Pulborough, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Pulborough, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Freeman est né en 1572, à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Freeman, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Katherin Tryphosa Isham, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Alice Coles le 1 janvier 1591, à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. En 1620, à l’âge de 48 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est yeoman à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 6 juin 1623, à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Freeman 1572 in Pulborough, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Freeman 31 und seine Mutter Katherin Tryphosa Isham 27. Er hat am 1. Januar 1591 in Pulborough, Sussex, England Alice Coles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1620, als er 48 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als yeoman in Pulborough, Sussex, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. Juni 1623 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Pulborough, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Pulborough, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Freeman è nato il nel 1572 nel Pulborough, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John Freeman, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Katherin Tryphosa Isham, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Alice Coles il 1 gennaio 1591, nel Pulborough, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1620, all'età di 48 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come yeoman nel Pulborough, Sussex, England. Morì il 6 giugno 1623, nel Pulborough, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Pulborough, Sussex, England.

ja.Pulborough, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスプウルボロウ
ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Freemanが1572年にイギリススセックスプウルボロウで生まれた時，父John Freemanは31歳，母Katherin Tryphosa Ishamは27歳であった。1591年1月1日にイギリススセックスプウルボロウでAlice Colesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1620年，48歳の時，イギリススセックスプウルボロウでの職業はyeomanと記録されている。彼は1623年6月6日にイギリスイギリススセックスプウルボロウで51歳で死去し，イギリススセックスプウルボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Freeman(이)가 1572년 영국 수세스 풀버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Freeman(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherin Tryphosa Isham(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1591년 1월 1일 영국 수세스 풀버루그h에서 Alice Coles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1620년, 48세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 수세스 풀버루그h에서 yeoman이었다. 그는 1623년 6월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 풀버루그h에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 풀버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.from 8 November 1598 to 18 November 1598: de 8 de novembro de 1598 a 18 de novembro de 1598
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Freeman nasceu em 1572, em Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Freeman, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Katherin Tryphosa Isham, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Coles em 1 de janeiro de 1591, em Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1620, com 48 anos, sua profissão aparece como yeoman em Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 6 de junho de 1623, em Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Freeman родился в 1572 г. в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Freeman было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Katherin Tryphosa Isham, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Coles 1 января 1591 г. в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1620 году, в возрасте 48 лет,  он работал по профессии yeoman в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия. Он умер 6 июня 1623 г. в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Freeman nació en 1572, en Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Freeman, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Katherin Tryphosa Isham, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alice Coles el 1 de enero de 1591, en Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1620, a la edad de 48 años, su ocupación registrada era yeoman en Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra. Murió el 6 de junio de 1623, en Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra.
